name: dxf-viewer-monorepo
description: DXF Viewer monorepo - core + api + ui + pricing + bot

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dxf-viewer/core-engine && npm run build -w @dxf-viewer/api-service && npm run build -w @dxf-viewer/pricing && npm run build -w @dxf-viewer/bot-service && npm run build -w @dxf-viewer/ui-app
